mapper.select: SELECT i.id, i.name, i.gender, i.province_id AS provinceId, i.category_id AS categoryId, i.level, i.birthday, i.intro, i.img_url AS imgUrl, i.create_time AS createTime, p.province_name AS provinceName, c.name AS categoryName FROM inheritor i LEFT JOIN province p ON i.province_id = p.id LEFT JOIN category c ON i.category_id = c.id ORDER BY i.id

SELECT i.id, i.name, i.gender, i.province_id AS provinceId, i.category_id AS categoryId, i.level, i.birthday, i.intro, i.img_url AS imgUrl, i.create_time AS createTime, p.province_name AS provinceName, c.name AS categoryName FROM inheritor i LEFT JOIN province p ON i.province_id = p.id LEFT JOIN category c ON i.category_id = c.id WHERE i.province_id = #{provinceId}
